title: senecio johnstonii var. battiscombei
intro: Senecio johnstonii var. battiscombei, also known as Johnston's ragwort, is a plant species native to Madagascar and part of the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Johnston's ragwort are said to include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
